introSection: Ultra Twister Megaton was a steel pipeline roller coaster previously located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On 8 August 2025, the park announced that the ride had closed permanently. It last operated in 2020.

Dismantling began by October 2025.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The ride uses a different array of colours for its track, these being white, red, yellow, pink and blue. The supports also vary in colour, using the same colours as the track.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ultra Twister Megaton on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Ultra Twister Megaton was a steel pipeline roller coaster previously located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

On 8 August 2025, the park announced that the ride had closed permanently. It last operated in 2020.

Dismantling began by October 2025.



The ride uses a different array of colours for its track, these being white, red, yellow, pink and blue. The supports also vary in colour, using the same colours as the track.




 * Ultra Twister Megaton on the parks website (Japanese)
